title: Ogrenci Not Sistemi
subtitle: Liste uzerinde ekleme, guncelleme, filtreleme.
code:
students = [
    {"name": "Ahmet", "grade": 85},
    {"name": "Ayse", "grade": 92},
    {"name": "Mehmet", "grade": 67},
    {"name": "Zeynep", "grade": 78},
    {"name": "Can", "grade": 55},
]

print("Tum ogrenciler:")
for s in students:
    print(f"{s['name']}: {s['grade']}")

# Yeni ogrenci ekleme
students.append({"name": "Elif", "grade": 88})
print(f"\nElif eklendi. Toplam ogrenci: {len(students)}")

# Not güncelleme
for s in students:
    if s["name"] == "Mehmet":
        s["grade"] = 70
        print(f"\nMehmet'in notu guncellendi: {s['grade']}")

# Geçenler / kalanlar
passing = [s for s in students if s["grade"] >= 60]
failing = [s for s in students if s["grade"] < 60]

print(f"\nGecen ogrenci sayisi: {len(passing)}")
print(f"Kalan ogrenci sayisi: {len(failing)}")

# Sıralama (en yüksekten en düşüğe)
print("\nNot siralamasi (yuksekten alcaga):")
for s in sorted(students, key=lambda x: x["grade"], reverse=True):
    print(f"{s['name']}: {s['grade']}")

# Ortalama
avg = sum(s["grade"] for s in students) / len(students)
print(f"\nSinif ortalamasi: {avg:.2f}")
